title: cynometra minor
intro: Cynometra minor, also known as the 'Cherry Mangosteen', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to repel and kill intestinal worms and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Cynometra minor include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Cynometra minor can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
